column1: Hey Canaan, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
cool i got you, which destination you lookin to book?
word, both are dope and have been popular this year
how many ppl you got in your group so far?
That's solid, you all in a frat/org or just a group of the homies getting together?
cool which school we from? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
oh dope! Yea i'll def hook it up for y'all
putting this info together for you right now, how soon were you looking to get things started?
just wanted to get an idea of a cost and compare it with a quote I got from a different company so we can get a trip planned in the next couple of weeks
okay, i'll send what i have now, just keep in mind prices change pretty quickly this time of year
cool if i send it through email? Little long for text
dope what's the best email to send to?

Actually lemme just send you this here quickly and them i'll email you over a deeper breakdown through email in a few Cancun sample quote : https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/IEBAGY5TT7 Cabo sample quote : https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/W2T8DBEZFT
This has rough pricing, whats included, etc and then I'll send details about travel insurance, add on options, and how booking works when i get home a little later brotha
just sent over the full email too btw. lmk if it came through
thank you! it came through thank you
do y'all handle flights at all?
Yea we do! It's just usually cheaper to do separately but I'm def down to do it all in one for you
yes if you could include flights that would be awesome!
we want to fly out of philly or newark whatever is cheaper
Yea I got you for sure! Did we want to narrow down on Cancun, or Cabo? Or still not sure
Bet no prob. Will look into it rn. If it takes me a min I may have to tap in with our operations team when they are back active this weekend
Sounds good no worries if so! You're the man
Yo if you don't mind me asking, what were prices like with the other company you were talking to? I'm down to make sure I get you a better deal
1800 per person (including flights) for five nights at Riu in Cabo
Aight cool, let's see what we can cook up bro
yoo what's good bro! sent over the info with flights included this weekend, did you get to check them out? got a steal of a deal for sure
Yo what's good Canaan bro, how we lookin with the group?
sup brotha any word on what we wanna do
yoo whats good bro, you get to book anything for spring break yet?
sup! you still lookin for help with spring break?
yes so sorry it's been a while
i think we are looking at 9 guys and looking to go to Cabo
all good broo. yea lets do it
were y'all ready to get the process started tonight?
would the quote stay the same?
without flights, yes, but with flights will have to check again
Canaan brotha whats good, we lookin to get things in motion for break?
yerr whats good bro, how we lookin so far for break?
sup! you get to book anything for break yet?
Yo, this is Canaan with the Lehigh group looking to go to Cabo
I added my boy in this (Nolan) so we can both plan this and make it happen
whats good fam, lets run it up. not sure my work phone shows group texts if thats what you set up, its like an sms platform we use
where we at with things? is the squad ready to lock in
bet that. we still thinkin cancun?
Yo! Okay bet bro let's get it going
Just wanna double check, are a couple of yall 21? There's a requirement for one person in each room to be 21 for check in
Just for the main Cabo party resort
bet and we still got 6 people?
yerr whats good my bad i missed this, but whats a good email for you, i'll send over that updated Cabo info and we can get things in motion
we were still lookin to do flights included right
yes but can you make the flights a seperate cost so we can see what the price would be without flights
Word I'll send you without flights rn first. dates were march 6-11?
I'll knock $50 off the price you see there on the link for y'all too
for flights, it was philly / newark right
Loved “I'll knock $50 off the price you see there on the …”
does this quote provide the party package?
if not, how much is the party package?
also, I found a cheaper package through STS (see picture). could you beat this price?
yea lets see what we can do. is that the final price at the last purchase page? sometimes there may be added fees at the end
yes I was in contact with them as well
the final price was higher because it included flights but that was their base price for the resort and all inclusive package
we also went with STS last year
okay cool, got you. I can hook it up bro
do you have the complete package with flights included? I'll se what we can chef up
honestly we can get flights ourselves we decided
aight bet gonna talk to the team now and see what we can do to match it!
hey got a quick answer. I'll be able to match that price. and looks like they have you at a $400 deposit to secure, ours will be $250
want me to get it set up for you rn?
Yes please that would be great! Thank you so much
yea no prob. will send over in 5
just emailed it all over! happy I got to make it work for you
some guys are asking if the deposit is refundable
yea they'll just want to add the travel protection insurance. theyll see the option when they go to make a payment
its a cancel for any reason policy. we have a third party insurance company Travel Insured that handles all of cancellations, claims, etc. Its covers up to 75% of your payments
yea they are just still undecided
and these guys are 3 additional guys so could be 9 total
cool, lmk if you want me to add those 3 slots when they decide. the 6 of you are still valid
three of us are locked in and paid the deposit🥳
Ayee let's go. Excited for yall
If we book our own flights, do y'all still provide transportation to and from airport
Yessir. Just enter you flight info onto your account and our ops team takes it from there
Gotcha, and it's included in the package?
Yea you should see it within your account as one of your included items
Also in the email I sent over originally
yoyo. any word on Dillon? he didnt make his deposit. and then we got one empty space left in that 2nd room
he said he is gonna pay tonight
yoyooo. so rn we have 5 ppl on your reservation, did you still plan on 6? also remember you may have mentioned another 3
yes still waiting for the 6th to put in his deposit
and yes potentially 3-5 more guys may join
hopefully can tell u more by tonight
word checkin in any word on that? I'ma be steppin out soon
i'll get the 6th to put in the dow payment
but i still don't know about the other guys
Just wanted to check before I dipped out
my dog! any word on those other ppl? more so the 6th
he said he is gonna pay today
he's killing me but we will get him to pay ASAP
word yea he must not be tryna go lolol
I've been fighting to keep this slot open over here
Aight bet, lmk if you need anything
yo i just paid in full
can you let me know who else has?

i know aidan palmer is in a tough situation rn, he's in the NCAA transfer portal for football and waiting to see what school he gets offers from, so he may not be able to pay in full for a few more weeks unlike the rest of us
but i believe he put in his deposit and he's still planning on going
Rn everyones paid except Aidan and Jackson D has no payments
Yea he just paid his deposit today
yoyo, just need Aidan and Jackson to get settled up so we can get your reservation fully situated
yerr happy new year brotha! any word on what Aidan and Jackson's plans are?
yo whats good bro, operations just hit me said they're going to remove Aidan and Jackson, do you know if they plan on coming still?
Jackson said he will get on it ASAP
I will reach out to Aidan
yoo any update on them bro? Operations is about to cancel them
yea he did, Aidan is the last one
So Aidan is in the transfer portal for football, so he may end up at a new school in a week or two
once he knows, he can confirm he has the same spring break dates
I apologize about his situation, the college football world is insane right now and things happened so fast for him
its all good. lmk soon as we know
when do we have to add the party packages by?
You got up to 2 days before the trip to add it in
Aidan is good to go now
can he still pay and we will be straight?
yoyo! yea asap if he can
he said he tried but the link wouldn't work
did you send him the link you have?
yes he said it didn't work
yea I'll send, its all the same link you all hopped on just fine tho
are we sure it was the link that didnt work or did he forget his password
he said it had a 404 error
https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/321TKTM0Z7 this is the res link you all have
also, do we all have to put in flight info even if half of us are on the same plane?
yea Aidan all paid up. and yea to be safe, you should all add it in individually
Liked “yea Aidan all paid up. and yea to be safe, you sho…”
yoyo, is Aidan the only one on a different flight?
i believe jackson dowd is with aidan
word if you want to confirm, I can get that added in for them
Yo! Excited for our trip! Is there any concern with the stuff happening in Mexico right now?
yoo! From what I've heard its all good bro, everything going on is on the other side of the country
whats good bro, does Aidan land a day after the rest of you? also is Jackson on the same flight as any of you
jackson and aidan are on the same flight
and yes it is a day after
bet bet. did y'all plan on adding any party pass to your accounts or nah
do any of the clubs or booze cruises interfere with the resort parties?
Also are there shuttles to the clubs and booze cruise for free
yoyo, nah nto really. the off resort events are more lit than the on resort events tho either way
but whenever theres a big on resort event, everyones mostly gonna be on resort
morning bro, is Jackson on the same flight as Aidan?
yo so what party packages are still available
yessir. what do you want added in?
That's the best lineup possible tbh
Did the whole group want those added in?
what is the additional cost and what are the dates?
yoyo I just looked and its lookin like I can only add the booze cruise event. the others you'll have to get when you get there based on availability
ok we will look into it all when we get there
